name.ja: 雷盟－ブレイクアウェイ

text.en:
Activate 1 of these effects;
● Place 1 "Blitzclique" Continuous Trap from your Deck face-up on your field.
● Return 1 Thunder monster you control to the hand, then target 1 card on the field; destroy it.
If a card(s) is destroyed by your "Blitzclique" card's effect, while this card is in your GY: You can add this card to your hand. You can only use each effect of "Blitzclique - Breakaway" once per turn.
